creator: shigeri@m10.alpha-net.ne.jp
text:
sylpheed version up

delete patch-ae

diff -ruN sylpheed.old/Makefile sylpheed/Makefile
--- sylpheed.old/Makefile       Wed May  9 01:59:12 2001
+++ sylpheed/Makefile   Sat Jul 21 00:31:35 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      sylpheed
-PORTVERSION=   0.4.66
+PORTVERSION=   0.5.1
 CATEGORIES=    mail ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=  http://sylpheed.good-day.net/sylpheed/
 
@@ -15,13 +15,13 @@
 USE_BZIP2=     yes
 USE_X_PREFIX=  yes
 USE_IMLIB=     yes
-USE_LIBTOOL=   yes
+USE_AUTOCONF=  yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV= CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
                LIBS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=        --disable-compface --disable-gdk-pixbuf --enable-ipv6
 
 PORTDOCS=      ChangeLog ChangeLog.jp INSTALL INSTALL.jp README README.jp \
-               TODO.jp
+               TODO TODO.jp
 
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
diff -ruN sylpheed.old/distinfo sylpheed/distinfo
--- sylpheed.old/distinfo       Wed May  9 02:03:07 2001
+++ sylpheed/distinfo   Sat Jul 21 00:02:20 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (sylpheed-0.4.66.tar.bz2) = dd997ca324a77d08de834cf81a66da0e
+MD5 (sylpheed-0.5.1.tar.bz2) = b589e1a95d7f534d9ec50ee263789150
diff -ruN sylpheed.old/distinfo sylpheed/pkg-plist
--- sylpheed.old/pkg-plist      Mon Apr 16 01:44:35 2001
+++ sylpheed/pkg-plist  Sat Jul 21 00:25:21 2001
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@
 share/doc/sylpheed/INSTALL.jp
 share/doc/sylpheed/README
 share/doc/sylpheed/README.jp
+share/doc/sylpheed/TODO
 share/doc/sylpheed/TODO.jp
 share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/sylpheed.mo
 share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/sylpheed.mo
